the native's husband being employed
in a machinery concern with possibility of being on the move frequently. It
will be a government concern as Mars is conjunct the Sun. The native will get

246 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
CHART 368
The Sun is in his own house.
With Ketu, Mars and Mercury in the Jupt. Ven.
12th and Saturn in the 2nd, the native's
Mars
father will start his life as a low paid
Mer.
official (Saturn in the second to the
Dt.
Sun). He will win fame and do noble
deeds and will rise high when Saturn Dh. Sun
contacts Jupiter situated in the house
of Venus and Venus himself in the
Moon Sat.
lOth to Saturn. He will amass great
wealth.
As regards the native, as Saturn is in Virgo, the house of exaltation for
Mercury," he will be employed in a commercial concern in a decent position.
But he will rise high only when Saturn transits Jupiter and Venus in Taurus
and Gemini respectively.
